products.name: RoyalStar RZ-36X6T (TI)-Titanium Blade Juice Maker
features: Healthy pure titanium knife comes with a cup of healthy original flavor: It does not oxidize, the juice is not blackened or metallic in taste during extraction, the fruit flavor is purer, and the titanium material has antibacterial properties.

High power instantaneous extraction: High-power motor, instantly crushes the pulp, and produces smooth and chunk-free juice in just a few seconds.
Minimalist operation: Abandoning cumbersome gears, simply start with one button, understanding life and being lazy.
Freshly squeezed and consumed immediately: Just want to juice? It can be done in just a few seconds, fresh and delicious, enjoying healthiness instantly.
